# Deckbase

> AI-powered flashcard app that turns books, notes, and PDFs into spaced-repetition flashcards using OCR and the FSRS algorithm.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://www.deckbase.co/)
- [Features](https://www.deckbase.co/features)
- [Premium](https://www.deckbase.co/premium)
- [Download](https://www.deckbase.co/download)
- [MCP integration](https://www.deckbase.co/mcp)
- [MCP for flashcards (resources guide)](https://www.deckbase.co/resources/mcp)
- [Documentation](https://www.deckbase.co/docs)

## Comparison & resource pages

- [Deckbase vs Anki](https://www.deckbase.co/deckbase-vs-anki): Side-by-side comparison of AI card generation, FSRS vs SM-2 scheduling, pricing
- [Deckbase vs Quizlet](https://www.deckbase.co/deckbase-vs-quizlet): Feature comparison for spaced repetition, AI workflows, and retention outcomes
- [Best Anki Alternatives (2026)](https://www.deckbase.co/anki-alternatives): Roundup of top flashcard apps with strengths, trade-offs, and use cases
- [Best Flashcard Apps (2026)](https://www.deckbase.co/best-flashcard-apps): Practical guide covering AI, FSRS, mobile, and student workflows
- [MCP for Flashcards Guide](https://www.deckbase.co/resources/mcp): How Deckbase MCP compares to other MCP servers with example workflows

## About

Deckbase is an iOS and Android app with a free tier and Premium plans. It scans physical books and digital documents to generate flashcard decks and schedules reviews using FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) for retention.

## Contact

support@deckbase.co
